title: Soapdenovo Genome assembly
steps: Soapdenovo contig assembly SOAPdenovo 63mer_V1.06 LINUX Filter and error corrected reads SOAPdenovo-63mer-V1.06_0718 pregraph -s $CFG -K 63 -o $PREFIX -p 16 SOAPdenovo-63mer-V1.06_0718 contig -g $PREFIX -M 2 SOAPdenovo-63mer-V1.06_0718 pregraph -s $CFG -K 63 -o $PREFIX -p 16 SOAPdenovo-63mer-V1.06_0718 contig -g $PREFIX -M 2 Contig fasta

Soapdenovo contig assembly SOAPdenovo 63mer_V1.06 LINUX Contig fasta, filter and error corrected reads SOAPdenovo-63mer-V1.06_0718 map -s $CFG -k 63 -g $PREFIX -p 16SOAPdenovo-63mer-V1.06_0718 scaff -g $PREFIX -p 16 SOAPdenovo-63mer-V1.06_0718 map -s $CFG -k 63 -g $PREFIX -p 16 SOAPdenovo-63mer-V1.06_0718 scaff -g $PREFIX -p 16 Scaffold fasta

Raw reads filtering by in-house programs. Filter by the quality, duplication and correct errors based on kmer frequency count. The open-source version programs are on the website http://soap.genomics.org.cn/soapdenovo.html. Fastq Filter and error corrected reads
creator: Haoxiang Lin
